slides.title: Your vessels start to *heal* the day you quit.
slides.sub: Nicotine tightens your blood vessels and wears down their lining. Stop, and the repair begins fast.

slides.title: Nicotine narrows the pipes
slides.body: Whether from cigarettes or vapes, nicotine *constricts your blood vessels* and raises the load on your heart with every dose.

slides.title: The lining takes the hit
slides.body: The endothelium is the thin layer inside every vessel. Nicotine injures it, which can stiffen arteries and limit healthy blood flow.

slides.title: Nitric oxide goes quiet
slides.body: Healthy vessels release nitric oxide to relax and open. Nicotine *blunts that signaling*, so arteries stay tighter than they should.

slides.title: Function returns in weeks
slides.body: After quitting, nitric oxide signaling and vascular function *can recover within weeks*, easing the strain on your heart and brain.

slides.title: Better flow, longer healthspan
slides.body: Healthier vessels carry oxygen to muscle and brain more freely. Quitting is *linked to* lower long-term cardiovascular risk.

slides.title: Track the habits that *help you heal*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the days you stay smoke-free are easy to see and build on.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Quitting nicotine is one of the fastest favors you can do for your blood vessels. The repair can start within weeks. 🌿

Nicotine narrows your vessels and injures their lining, but stopping lets nitric oxide signaling and healthy blood flow return to support heart and brain. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
